trivia_bullets.text: Uncommon enchantment from Core Set 2021 (released July 3, 2020), a Teferi-centered set. Plane-agnostic flavor text implies a generic fantasy setting, consistent with core set design convention.
sources: WebSearch snippet: CardKingdom Blog Magic Core Sets Retrospective

trivia_bullets.text: "When griffins started nesting atop the northern tower, the castellan worried they'd be a nuisance. Instead, they took the entire castle under their protection." — no speaker. Frames the mechanic as emergent mutualism: griffins get a roost, castle gets aerial defense.

End-step trigger creates a 2/2 white Griffin flying token when you gained 3+ life that turn. EDHREC rank 5,015 — top-tier M21 uncommon Commander inclusion, appearing in ~25,100 decks across ~3.46M tracked Commander decks. Core in Ayli, Soul Sisters, and Lathiel lifegain strategies. Not legal in Pauper (uncommon, not common).
Rules clarification: the trigger checks gross life gained that turn, not net — life lost does not cancel life gained for the trigger. A player who gains 4 and loses 10 still triggers Griffin Aerie.
sources: Scryfall rulings / WebSearch snippet via mtgassist.com

trivia_bullets.text: Art by Milivoj Ćeran, Croatian professional fantasy illustrator based in Zaprešić with 93+ Magic cards to his credit (Gatherer). Maintains portfolio at mceran-art.com. No Hipsters of the Coast spotlight found for this card.

related_cards.note: White flying token generator triggered by life gain — direct mechanical predecessor
